title: Department of Information Technology - About Us
content:
Department of Information Technology - About Us

The duties of the Information Processing Department are as follows;

Compiling, evaluating, keeping records and publishing all kinds of information in education and research,

Transferring the necessary publications and documents to the IT environment, protecting them and putting them into service when necessary,

Budget and investments; the distribution of academic staff and students by faculties, colleges, institutes, departments, departments; keeping records of physical facilities and resources of universities,

To perform other data processing services to be provided by the Presidency.

This content was updated on 17/09/2024.
